resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def longestDecomposition(self, text: str) -> int:
        n = len(text)
        dp = [0] * (n + 1)
        dp[0] = 0
        for i in range(1, n + 1):
            for j in range(i):
                if text[j:i] == text[n - (i - j):n - (i - j) + (i - j)] and dp[j] + 1 > dp[i]:
                    dp[i] = dp[j] + 1
        return dp[n]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: MEDIUM
explanation: Dynamic programming approach to track the longest decomposition by comparing substrings from start and end.
